title: MBS core.signed_action block
description: Request for non-repudiable recipient acknowledgment. The DocuSign-replacement primitive. Per §7.2.2.

action_id.description: Sender-assigned identifier unique within the thread.

prompt.description: User-facing prompt (single-locale string or per-locale object).

canonical_text.description: The exact text the recipient is asked to sign. MUST be shown verbatim in the recipient client. This is the bytes that enter the signed hash; court presentation references this field.

canonical_text_hash.description: BLAKE3 of canonical_text. Redundant with canonical_text but enables hash-only verification after canonical_text is discarded.

required_tier.description: Minimum tier required for the acknowledgment response. Typically SIGNED for casual agreements, QUALIFIED for legal commitments.

expires.description: Beyond this time the request is void; late acknowledgments are refused.

additional_fields.description: Optional structured data the sender wants to bind into the signed acknowledgment (contract parameters, amounts, counterparty, etc.).
